text: Source and Manage Candidates for Events | HackerRank Knowledge Base Source and Manage Candidates for Events After setting up your event, you can source and manage candidates through the following: Promote the event on the HackerRank Community Promote the event on the HackerRank Community Share the event on social channels Share the event on social channels Promote event on the HackerRank Community You can publish your microsite on the HackerRank Community to attract candidates for your event. Promotion slot availability Two targeted promotion slots Two targeted promotion slots One general slot visible to all candidates One general slot visible to all candidates Set up your promotion To publish your event promotion on the HackerRank Community: Log in to Engage using your credentials. Log in to Engage using your credentials. Select the event you want to promote. Select the event you want to promote. In the left panel, select Promotions . In the left panel, select Promotions . Enter the following details: Title Description Background color for the promotion tile Enter the following details: Title Title Description Description Background color for the promotion tile Background color for the promotion tile (Optional) Define a target audience to display the promotion only to specific users. If you do not modify the target audience filters, the targeted promotion slots will be shown to all candidates in the HackerRank Community, in addition to the general slot. (Optional) Define a target audience to display the promotion only to specific users. If you do not modify the target audience filters, the targeted promotion slots will be shown to all candidates in the HackerRank Community, in addition to the general slot. Review your promotion details and click Publish to open the confirmation pop-up. Review your promotion details and click Publish to open the confirmation pop-up. Click Publish again to submit your promotion. Click Publish again to submit your promotion. Publish event on social channels To maximize visibility and drive registrations, promote your event across multiple platforms: Share your microsite on social channels such as LinkedIn , Facebook , and Google . Share your microsite on social channels such as LinkedIn , Facebook , and Google . Publish it on your company’s career site . Publish it on your company’s career site .
